description.zh-TW: 標準的倉庫單元，支持交易功能，同時滅火器防火。
description.en: Standard warehouse unit with trading functionality, equipped with fire extinguishers for fire protection.
description.ru: Стандартная складская единица с функцией торговли, оборудованная огнетушителями для противопожарной защиты.
description.fr: Unité d'entrepôt standard avec fonctionnalité de commerce, équipée d'extincteurs pour la protection contre l'incendie.
description.ja: 取引機能をサポートする標準的な倉庫ユニットで、消火器で防火対策を施しています。

pawn.name: 维多利亚
pawn.data: pawn.name: 公猞猁 1
pawn.data: 公猞猁 1*Lynx*伊恩艾尔|VFEE_NewFamily*公猞猁 1*8381625*-4535426*1***0*****FF-FF-FF-FF*FF-FF-FF-FF*-1*FF-FF-FF-FF*FF-FF-FF-FF*FF-FF-FF-FF***RIMTALK_PERSONA:%E5%8A%A8%E7%89%A9%EF%BC%9A%E7%AE%80%E5%8D%95%E3%80%81%E6%84%9F%E6%80%A7%E3%80%81%E6%9C%AC%E8%83%BD%E4%BC%98%E5%85%88%E2%80%94%E2%80%94%E7%94%A8%E7%AE%80%E7%9F%AD%E7%9A%84%E6%84%9F%E5%AE%98%E5%8F%A5%E5%BC%8F%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0%E6%B0%94%E5%91%B3%E3%80%81%E9%A5%A5%E9%A5%BF%E4%B8%8E%E5%8D%B1%E9%99%A9%E3%80%82|0.2*******Kills|0:KillsHumanlikes|0:KillsAnimals|0:KillsMechanoids|0:PawnsDowned|0:PawnsDownedHumanlikes|0:PawnsDownedAnimals|0:PawnsDownedMechanoids|0:ShotsFired|0:Headshots|0:DamageDealt|0:DamageTaken|0:TimesInMentalState|0:TimesOnFire|0:FiresExtinguished|0:OperationsReceived|0:OperationsPerformed|0:TimesTendedTo|0:TimesTendedOther|0:PeopleCaptured|0:PrisonersRecruited|0:PrisonersChatted|0:AnimalsTamed|0:AnimalsSlaughtered|0:MealsCooked|0:ThingsConstructed|0:ThingsInstalled|0:ThingsRepaired|0:ThingsCrafted|0:ThingsHauled|0:PlantsSown|0:PlantsHarvested|0:CellsMined|0:MessesCleaned|0:ResearchPointsResearched|0:CorpsesBuried|0:NutritionEaten|3.5:BodiesStripped|0:ThingsUninstalled|0:ThingsDeconstructed|0:ArtifactsActivated|0:ContainersOpened|0:SwitchesFlicked|0:TimeAsColonistOrColonyAnimal|650480:TimeAsQuestLodger|0:TimeAsPrisoner|0:TimeInBed|0:TimeInBedForMedicalReasons|0:TimeDowned|0:TimeGettingFood|5760:TimeGettingJoy|0:TimeUnderRoof|386640:TimeDrafted|0:TimeOnFire|0:TimeInMentalState|0:TimeHauling|0:TimeHandlingAnimals|0:TimeFirefighting|0:TimeWardening|0:TimeHunting|0:TimeConstructing|0:TimeTreatingAndFeeding|0:TimeResearching|0:TimeCleaning|0:TimeRepairing|0:TimeMining|0:TimeSowingAndHarvesting|0:TimeAsChildInColony|0:KillsEntities|0:PawnsDownedEntities|0*Food|0.7248022:Rest|0.8147495********0*0**FF-FF-FF-FF***[ludeon.rimworld|cj.rimtalk]*********FF-FF-FF-FF***
